label: Send Order Confirmation
description: Receives an order confirmation request, renders an HTML email from the order data using a Jinja2 template, and sends the email to the customer. In the active dummy mode, the email is logged rather than sent via an external provider.

business.summary: Sends an order confirmation email to the customer after checkout completes. The email contains the order ID, shipping tracking ID, shipping cost, shipping address, and a table of ordered items with quantities and prices. In dummy mode (the current production configuration), the request is logged without actually sending an email.
rules: The confirmation email is rendered from the confirmation.html Jinja2 template using the order data from the request.
In dummy mode, the email is not actually sent; instead the request is logged with the recipient email address.
In non-dummy mode (not currently implemented), the email would be sent via a Google Cloud mail client.
Template rendering failures result in a gRPC INTERNAL error without attempting to send.
preconditions: A valid SendOrderConfirmationRequest is received containing an email address and order details
outcomes: In dummy mode: the email request is logged with the recipient address
In non-dummy mode: a confirmation email is sent to the customer's email address

failure_modes.response: gRPC INTERNAL status code is returned with message 'An error occurred when preparing the confirmation mail.'

failure_modes.condition: Email sending fails via Google API (GoogleAPICallError) — non-dummy mode only
failure_modes.response: gRPC INTERNAL status code is returned with message 'An error occurred when sending the email.'

steps.action: log the email confirmation request with the recipient address
steps.notes: In dummy mode, this is the only step. The email address and order data are not persisted or forwarded.
